rules.name: tax_office_finanzamt
rules.description: Matches 'Finanzamt' followed by specific known locations. Removed restrictive negative lookahead to allow 'vom' and dates.

rules.name: tax_office_fa
rules.description: Matches 'FA' followed by specific known locations. Removed restrictive negative lookahead to allow 'vom' and dates.

rules.name: specific_org_dias_telekom
rules.description: Matches the specific entity 'DIAS Telekom Institut'.

rules.name: specific_org_bezirksgericht
rules.description: Matches 'Bezirksgericht' followed by a location, avoiding duplication.

rules.name: specific_org_leiss
rules.description: Matches 'Leiss Software' which appears without GmbH in the text.

rules.name: company_gmbh_general
rules.description: Matches generic company names ending in 'GMBH', ensuring the name starts with a capitalized word and has at least one preceding word, excluding common non-entity prefixes.

rules.name: company_ag_general
rules.description: Matches generic company names ending in 'AG', ensuring the name starts with a capitalized word.

rules.name: company_kg_general
rules.description: Matches generic company names ending in 'KG', ensuring the name starts with a capitalized word and has at least one preceding word, excluding common non-entity prefixes.

rules.name: specific_org_raiffeisen_kasse_hyphen
rules.description: Matches 'Raiffeisenkasse' followed by hyphenated locations like 'Retz-Pulkautal'.

rules.name: specific_org_lognex
rules.description: Matches 'Lognex-IT AG' specifically to avoid partial matches.

rules.name: specific_org_celikkanat_garten
rules.description: Matches 'Celikkanat Garten' (without GmbH in this context).

rules.name: specific_org_raiffeisen_hyphen
rules.description: Matches 'Raiffeisenbank' followed by hyphenated locations like 'Süd-Weststeiermark' or 'Rion Vöcklabruck'.

rules.name: specific_org_sudversand
rules.description: Matches 'SüdVersand' specifically to avoid partial matches.
